title: ODFA-052 I'm Graduating Soon... Student Number 026 Kana Matsui
overview: I am graduating soon. For me, the best memory of my student life is meeting Sensei. During class and after school, I watched Sensei all the time. Sensei may not have noticed. So, before we can't meet again before I graduate. I would like to convey my thoughts. Before I graduate, I want to make some secret memories with Sensei...
